---
title: "Investigating Spatial Distribution of Cetacean in the British Gibraltar Territorial Waters (BGTW)"
author: "Simon Gendrisch"   
keywords: [Cetacean, BGTW, Spatial Distribution, Kernel Density Estimation, Land Based Surveys]

format: 
  typst:
        template-partials: 
          - typst/typst-show.typ
          - typst/journal/typst-template.typ
        output-file: M8.2_SupDoc_206708
        citeproc: true
bibliography: refs.bib
csl: "SoMESHarvard.csl"

crossref:
    custom:
        - kind: float
          reference-prefix: Appendix
          key: app
          latex-env: app

---

```{=typst}
#import "@preview/glossarium:0.5.10": make-glossary, register-glossary, print-glossary, gls, glspl, Gls, Glspl
#show: make-glossary
#let abbreviations = (
  (key: "bgtw", short: "BGTW", long: "British Gibraltar Territorial Waters"),
  (key: "iwc",  short: "IWC",  long: "International Whaling Commission"),
  (key: "noaa", short: "NOAA", long: "National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration"),
  (key: "obis", short: "OBIS", long: "Ocean Biodiversity Information System"),
  (key: "spue", short: "SPUE", long: "Sightings per unit effort"),
  (key: "pid", short: "Photo-ID", long: "Photo Identification"),
  (key: "aic", short: "AIC", long: "Akaike Information Criterion"),
  (key: "kde", short: "KDE", long: "Kernel Density Estimation"),
  (key: "locoh", short: "LoCoH", long: "Local Convex Hull"),
  (key: "hr", short: "hr", long: "Hazard-rate"),
  (key: "hn", short: "hn", long: "Half-normal"),
  (key: "imma", short: "IMMA", long: "Important Marine Mammal Area"),
  (key: "accobams", short: "ACCOBAMS", long: "Agreement on the Conservation of Cetaceans of the Black Sea, Mediterranean Sea and contiguous Atlantic area"),
)
#register-glossary(abbreviations)
```
```{=typst}
#counter(page).update(1)
#set page(numbering: "i")
```
```{=typst}
#[
```

# Generative AI (GenAI) Use
This is just a short summary of how AI was used. See Declaration of Originality and use of Gen AI for more details.

# List of Content
```{=typst}
#[
  #show outline.entry.where(
    level: 1
  ): set block(above: 1.2em)

  #outline(
    title: []
  )
]
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

# List of Tables
```{=typst}

#outline(
  title: [],
  target: figure.where(kind: "quarto-float-tbl"),
)
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

# List of Figures
```{=typst}
#outline(
  title: [],
  target: figure.where(kind: "quarto-float-fig"),
)
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

# List of Appendices
```{=typst}
#outline(
  title: [],
  target: figure.where(kind: "quarto-float-app"),
)
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

# List of Abbreviations
```{=typst}
#[
  #print-glossary(
    abbreviations,
    show-all: true,                // Option 1: list all declared terms
    disable-back-references: true, // omit "used on page N" links
  )
]
```
{{< pagebreak >}}

# List of R packages

{{< include ./chapters/packages.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Definitions
<!-- Include watches, SPUE sightings -->

{{< include ./chapters/definitions.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Acknowledgements 

{{< include ./chapters/acknowledgements.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=typst}
] <no-wc>
```

```{=typst}
#counter(page).update(1)
#set page(numbering: "1")
```

# Introduction / Literature review 

{{< include ./chapters/intro.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Methods {#methods-sec .unnumbered}

{{< include ./chapters/methods.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Results

{{< include ./chapters/results.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Discussion

{{< include ./chapters/discussion.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=typst}
#[
```

# References
::: {#refs}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Appendices

{{< include ./chapters/appendix.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Science Communication output

{{< include ./chapters/comms.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

<!-- Declaration of Originality and AI -->
```{=typst}
#[
  #pagebreak(weak:true)
  #page(header: [
    #set text(size: 9pt)
    #grid(
      columns: (1fr, auto),
      align: (bottom + left, bottom + right),
      text(weight: "bold", size: 12pt)[C1.1#h(0.6em)Declaration of Originality],
      image("/misc/Logo-Red-Crest-Side.png", width: 3cm),
    )
    #v(-4pt)
    #line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + gray)
  ],
  )[  #heading(level: 1)[Declaration of Originality / Use of Gen AI]
      #let decl_title  = doc_title
      //#let decl_title  = "Test Title"
      #let decl_author = doc_authors.at(0)
      //#let decl_author = "Test Author"
      #let decl_date = datetime.today().display("[day]/[month]/[year]")
      #set text(size: 11pt, hyphenate: false)
      #set par(justify: true, leading: 0.8em)
      #let decl_head(body) = table.cell(
        fill: rgb("#FF0000"),
        inset: 6pt,
        text(weight: "bold", fill: white, body),)

      #let decl_cell(body) = table.cell(inset: 8pt, body)

      #let decl_item(body) = list(indent: 6pt, body-indent: 6pt, body)

      #emph[
      Students are required to complete this Declaration of Originality (amending
      and/or deleting as appropriate #text(fill: rgb("#FF0000"))[all red text]) and
      include at the front of work submitted for assessment.
      ]

      #v(0.5em)

      #table(
      columns: (100%),
      stroke: black,
      inset: 0pt,

      decl_head[Originality],
      decl_cell[
        I, *#decl_author*, confirm that the work presented here -- *#decl_title*. --
        is an original piece of work in that I am the sole originator and author of
        the work.
      ],
      decl_cell[
        I also confirm that: \
        #decl_item[       
          #emph[the work *has not* been submitted in whole or part for any other
          assessment at the University of Gibraltar, or for any comparable academic
          award elsewhere;]
        ]
      ],

      decl_head[Copyright],
      decl_cell[
        #decl_item[
          I confirm that where necessary (i.e., reproduction of substantial text,
          tables, diagrams, websites, recordings of performances, reproductions of
          artworks) all 3#super[rd] party copyright permissions have been sought and
          such evidence can be found at.]
        #decl_item[I confirm that copyright permissions have been sought for all my previously
          published work reproduced here and such evidence can be found at.]
      ],
      
      decl_head[Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI)],
      decl_cell[
        \u{2610} I HAVE NOT used any Generative AI tools in the completion of this assignment. \ 
      
        \u{2612} I HAVE used Generative AI tools in the completion of this assignment. The
        tools I used were (please list tools used and how you have used them within
        the assignment): \ \ 

        *Student Number:* 206708\ 
        *Student Signature:* #image("/misc/Unterschrift.png", width: 20%) \ 
        *Date:* #decl_date
        ],
      
      )

    #pagebreak()

    #table(
      columns: (100%),
      stroke: black,
      inset: 0pt,

      decl_head[Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI)],
      decl_cell[I used AI as follows: \ \ 
                *ChatGPT:* \ 
                - Used for troubleshooting of code
                - Spellchecking of the document
                - Used to make the paragraphs sound "scientific" and cohesive
                \ 
                *Claude:* \ 
                - Troubleshooting of code
                - Providing a useful and comprehensive structure of the journal article
                - Used to make the paragraphs sound "scientific" and cohesive

      
      ],
      

    )
    ]

]

```


```{=typst}
] <no-wc>
```
